title: Context Collector — Input Contract
description: Schema for the input provided to the context-collector skill by job-orchestrator or user.

ACTION.description: The operation to perform. 'collect' builds a new context document; 'update' refreshes an existing one.

JOB_NAME.description: Kebab-case job folder name. Must match an existing folder under JOBS_ROOT.

JOBS_ROOT.description: Absolute path to the jobs root directory. Default: <PROJECT_DIR>/jobs. Override: $GOODAI_JOBS_ROOT.

PROJECT_DIR.description: Absolute path to the project directory to analyze for codebase patterns and package.json.

TASK_DESCRIPTION.description: What the job is about — from issue, user request, or analysis. Required for both 'collect' and 'update'.

FOCUS_AREAS.description: Optional. Specific areas to focus on, e.g. 'MobX stores', 'pipeline validation'. Accepts a string or an array of strings.

ANALYSIS_RESULT.description: Optional. Output from issue-analyzer, if available. May be a file path or inline content.
examples: Inline Gherkin or analysis summary text

KNOWN_LIBRARIES.description: Optional. Libraries already identified prior to context collection. Accepts a list of package names or a comma-separated string.

UPDATE_REASON.description: Required when ACTION is 'update'. Describes why the context document needs refreshing.
examples: Review finding suggests different MobX pattern should be used

DATA.TASK_DESCRIPTION: Implement a SaveMode toggle component that switches between draft and published states in the pipeline editor.
Implement a SaveMode toggle component that switches between draft and published states in the pipeline editor.
DATA.UPDATE_REASON: New library tanstack/query discovered during implementation — need documentation on optimistic update patterns.
